title: Cell (Vanilla+)
description: Adds 200+ various tweaks, items, commands, food, armor, blocks, equipment, automation, and more!
body:
# Cell Welcome to 'Cell', a Vanilla+ style mod that brings a new depth to your Minecraft experience. Meticulously crafted to blend seamlessly with the vanilla game, Cell introduces a wealth of features that enrich gameplay without overwhelming its core essence. Discover new recipes, equipment, magical tomes, alchemical stones, and much more. Whether you're an adventurer, builder, or wizard at heart, Cell offers something unique for every type of player. ## Exciting Features ### 🛠️ Recipe Tweaks & Equipment - **Innovative Recipes:** Explore altered and additional crafting recipes that add complexity and variety. - **Enhanced Equipment:** Discover new tools and gadgets to aid in your Minecraft adventures. ### 🏰 Unique Structures - **Mysterious Buildings:** Stumble upon newly added structures with secrets to uncover. - **Architectural Variety:** Each structure is designed to complement the existing Minecraft world, enriching your exploration. ### 🍲 Diverse Food Options - **Gourmet Delights:** A wide range of new culinary options to satisfy your hunger in-game. - **Nutritional Balance:** Food items offering various buffs and effects, enhancing gameplay strategy. ### 🔮 Alchemy & Magic - **Alchemy Stone:** Unleash the power of alchemy for various transmutations and enhancements. - **Magic Tomes:** Delve into arcane knowledge with books that grant you new magical abilities. ### ✨ New Commands & Functionalities - **Enhanced Control:** Additional commands to provide players with more control over their gameplay. - **Quality of Life Improvements:** Features designed to streamline and enhance the gaming experience. ### 🛡️ Advanced Armor & More - **Protective Gear:** New armor sets with unique abilities and aesthetics. - **Expansive Arsenal:** A broader range of weapons and defensive tools to equip yourself against the dangers of the world. ### 🚀 Automation - **Antimatter Void:** New dimension filled with infinite antimatter. - **Antimatter Converter:** Lategame crafting station used to convert antimatter into any other item or block, effectively an item duplicator. ## System Requirements - Operating System: Windows, macOS, Linux - RAM: Recommended 4GB (6GB for optimal performance) - GPU: Basic GPU sufficient, advanced GPU for better aesthetics # Features List
Structures Campsite
Crashed cart
Micro Igloo
Oasis
Antimatter Start the antimatter age by grinding a dragon egg in a stonecutter
Place totem of undying in the middle of the crafting table with 3 antimatter in the top row and one in the bottom middle to make the talisman
Use the talisman to travel to the antimatter void dimension
Harvest as much antimatter as you need
Craft the antimatter converter with two sponges, 4 uranium, a dragon egg, and 2 sculk catalysts
Place antimatter in the left slot and one of the item you want to duplicate in the right slot and watch the numbers skyrocket
Alchemy Stone Craft the alchemy stone with redstone, lapis, emerald, diamond, echo shard, glowstone, quartz, amethyst, prismarine crystals
Stone to cobblestone
Cobblestone to stone
Sand to red sand
Red sand to sand
Gravel to sand
Dirt to coarse dirt
Coarse dirt to dirt
Netherrack to magma
Oak sapling to spruce sapling
Spruce sapling to birch sapling
Birch sapling to jungle sapling
Jungle sapling to acacia sapling
Acacia sapling to dark oak sapling
Dark oak sapling to cherry sapling
Charcoal to coal
Iron ingot to gold
Gold ingot to iron
Lapis to redstone
Redstone to lapis
Quartz to glowstone
Glowstone to quartz
Carrot to potato
Potato to carrot
Pumpkin seeds to melon seeds
Melon seeds to pumpkin seeds
Water bucket to lava bucket
Lava bucket to water bucket
Leather to rabbit hide
String to feather
Feather to string
Dead bush to vines
Food Sweet Berry Juice made from sweet berries, glass bottle, and sugar
Smoked apple made from apple on a campfire
Grind wheat into flour on a stonecuuter, which can be used on water cauldron to make dough, which can be baked in a furnace, smoker, or campfire to make bread
Cook a beacon in a blast furnace to make edible uranium, keeping you full for 10 hours
Armor Wool Hood
Wool Coat
Wool Leggings
Wool Socks
Multitools Wooden Multitool
Stone Multitool
Flint Survival Tool
Gold Multitool
Iron Multitool
Obsidian Survival Tool
Diamond Multitool
Netherite Multitool
Daggers Wooden Dagger
Stone Dagger
Gold Dagger
Iron Dagger
Diamond Dagger
Netherite Dagger
Spell Tomes Vitality Tome: Heals you to full health, 45 second cooldown
Archery Tome: Gives you 16 arrows, 2 minute cooldown
Wisdom Tome: Gives you 30 XP, 2 minute cooldown
Tranquility Tome: Gives you tranquil potion effects, 2 minute cooldown
Wrath Tome: Grants you temporary wrath, 2 minute cooldown
Spears Flint Spear
Obsidian Spear
Commands /fly
/godmode
/dimension
Achievements Eating uranium
Getting antimatter converter
Getting alchemy stone
Achievement for each individual tome
Making dough
Getting to the antimatter void dimension
Recipe Tweaks Use mossy cobble as a replacement for cobble in some recipes
Combine dirt with bone meal to make grass blocks
Combine saplings, leaves, bone meal, and rotten flesh to make dirt
Combine dirt with both mushroom types to make mycelium
Compress 4 cobble into a deepslate block
Craft dead bushes with 3 sticks
Turn eggs into turtle eggs with seagrass and water bottles
Make vines into glow lichen with glow ink
Combine redstone and lapis into amethyst
Turn sweet berries into glow berries with glow ink
Craft leads using 3 leather
Craft saddles using leather, iron, and string
Bundle crafting recipe using rabbit hide and string
Craft tridents using prismarine shards, crystals, and the heart of the sea
Chainmail armor crafting recipes using iron nuggets
God apple recipe brought back using gold blocks
Craft name tags with paper and string
Craft elytra with phantom membrane and dragon egg
Shapeless paper, bread, and shulker box recipes
Dragon egg craftable with 4 popped chorus fruit, 4 end crystals, and a dragon head
Dragon egg grindable into 4 antimatter (modded)
Cooking/Smelting Tweaks Tan rotten flesh into leather by cooking it on campfire
Melt powdered snow bucket into water bucket by smelting it
Cure poisonous potatoes by cooking in a smoker to make baked potatoes
Cook logs on a campfire to turn it into charcoal
Stonecutter Tweaks Grind gravel into flint
Grind magma blocks into magma cream
Grind nether wart blocks into nether wart
Process wool into string
Villager Trades Armorer sells lava bucket
Wandering trader sells sweet berries
Brewing Tweaks Brew blaze rods into a bucket to make lava
Brew ender pearls into empty bottles to make xp bottles
Check out my other projects at [Sfinford Development](https://sfinford.github.io/Sfinford-Development/)
